validation: The supplied SF Intermosaic glyph atlas, raised glyph extrusion, background plate, and authored bounds match realized Blender output exactly. All thirteen text, layout, transform, background, and extreme character-spacing cases have exact vertex and face counts. Four-decimal bounds differ by at most 0.0001 units. Browser authored mode reconstructs the flat.nodes col/power emission and black background plate without display tone mapping. Aligned Blender/WebGL captures reach 0.981835 silhouette IoU, 0.032852 RGB MAE, and 0.999343 macro luminance correlation.
